untranslatable_reason: Signal cannot be fully translated: (1) Entry conditions are marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no specified entry logic, only exit/stop-loss rules provided. (2) Stop loss threshold is defined as 'greater than maximum intraday drawdown observed in backtests' — this requires a dynamic parameter derived from historical backtest analysis rather than a fixed indicator or percentage. The value 'BACKTEST_MAX_INTRADAY_DRAWDOWN' is not a real-time indicator available in the allowed list. (3) The rule is defensive/protective in nature (when to exit/stop) rather than a complete entry-exit trading signal. Without the actual numeric backtest MDD value or a way to calculate it from live data, this cannot be operationalized in a live backtest engine.
translation_notes: This signal is a stop-loss placement rule for mean-reverting strategies rather than a complete trade entry/exit system. It advises setting stops wider than the observed maximum intraday drawdown to filter false exits during normal reversion while protecting against regime changes. The core constraint is that 'BACKTEST_MAX_INTRADAY_DRAWDOWN' must be supplied as an external parameter based on historical analysis of the specific strategy being protected.
